subtitle.ja: ひもの端を左右の手に持ち、利き手側を上に重ねます
subtitle.en: Hold the ends of the string in both hands, with the dominant side on top.

subtitle.ja: 利き手側で持っているひもを結びます
subtitle.en: Tie the string held in the dominant hand.

subtitle.ja: ひもを左右の手で持ち替え、残っているひもを結びます
subtitle.en: Switch the string between your hands and tie the remaining string.

subtitle.ja: 両手でひもを強く引っ張ってひもの完成です
subtitle.en: Pull the string tightly with both hands to complete the knot.
